description: §39.12 compile-time placement rejection — the `<schema>` block is nested inside a `<div>` rather than sitting as an immediate child of the `<program>` root. The gauntlet placement check walks the AST with a parent-kind stack; a `state`/`stateType:"schema"` node whose immediate parent is anything other than the `<program>` root markup is rejected with E-SCHEMA-003. Here the schema's parent is `<div>`, so the diagnostic fires.
rationale: §39.12 error table + §39.3 normative statement: a `<schema>` block SHALL appear as an immediate child of the `<program>` root. A `<schema>` block nested inside any other block (logic context, component body, `<page>`, `<db>`, `<div>`, etc.) SHALL be a compile error (E-SCHEMA-003). Resolution: move the `<schema>` block out so it is a direct child of `<program>`.
